info.title: Khana API
info.description: Internal OpenAPI documentation for validating and testing Khana API endpoints before frontend integration.

servers.description: Relative server root for exported specs and local docs

jwt-bearer.description: Use Authorization: Bearer <token> for protected endpoints.

workspaceName.description: Tenant workspace name created during owner signup.

workspaceSlug.description: Optional public workspace slug. Generated when omitted.

password.description: Initial password for the owner account.

email.description: Email address for the new tenant user.

password.description: Initial password for the new user.

name.description: Display name for the new user.

phone.description: Optional contact phone number for the new user.

subdomain.description: Optional tenant subdomain hint for public login flows.

refreshToken.description: Refresh token that will be rotated for a new access token.
Optional refresh token override when the caller cannot rely on the JWT session context alone.

sessionId.description: Session identifier for the device that should be revoked.

currentPassword.description: Current password used to verify the account owner.

newPassword.description: New password that will replace the current one.

message.example: If the account exists, password reset instructions were sent.

email.description: Email address for the password reset request.

token.description: Password reset token issued by the forgot-password flow.

newPassword.description: New password that will be saved for the account.

tags.description: Tenant-scoped customer tags to persist on the customer profile.

startTime.description: Desired waitlist slot start time in ISO-8601 format.

endTime.description: Desired waitlist slot end time in ISO-8601 format.

facilityId.description: Facility identifier for the waitlist request.

desiredTimeSlot.description: Desired time slot for the waitlist entry.

facilityId.description: Facility identifier for the slot that became available.

desiredStartTime.description: Desired slot start time in ISO-8601 format.

desiredEndTime.description: Desired slot end time in ISO-8601 format.

startTime.description: Requested booking start time in ISO-8601 format.

endTime.description: Requested booking end time in ISO-8601 format.

customerName.description: Customer display name recorded on the booking.

customerPhone.description: Customer phone number used for lookup and notifications.

promoCode.description: Optional promo code to validate and apply during booking.

status.description: Optional booking status override. Only pending holds are accepted from the API.

frequency.description: Recurrence frequency supported by the bookings workflow.

intervalWeeks.description: Interval in weeks. Use 1 for weekly and 2 for biweekly.

endsAtDate.description: Inclusive end date for the recurrence window.

occurrences.description: Maximum number of recurring instances to create.

facilityId.description: Facility identifier for the recurring booking series.

startTime.description: Start time for the first booking instance.

endTime.description: End time for the first booking instance.

customerName.description: Customer name stored on each created booking.

customerPhone.description: Customer phone number used for dedupe and notifications.

status.description: Optional booking status override. Only pending holds are accepted from the API.

recurrenceRule.description: Recurrence rule that expands the booking series.

paymentStatus.description: Payment collection status for the booking.

cancellationReason.description: Cancellation reason recorded when a booking is cancelled through the API.

cancellationScope.description: Cancellation scope used when the booking belongs to a recurring series.

message.example: The selected slot overlaps with an existing booking.

facilityId.description: Facility identifier for the preview request.

startTime.description: Requested booking start time in ISO-8601 format.

endTime.description: Requested booking end time in ISO-8601 format.

promoCode.description: Optional promo code to validate during preview.

pricePerHour.description: Hourly price configured for the facility.

type.description: Facility type label used by the tenant.

config.description: Pricing and operating-hours configuration for the facility.

pricePerHour.description: Updated hourly price for the facility.

openTime.description: Updated opening time in 24-hour HH:mm format.

closeTime.description: Updated closing time in 24-hour HH:mm format.

name.description: Updated display name for the facility.

role.description: Updated role for the tenant user.

isActive.description: Whether the tenant user remains active and able to sign in.

email.description: Email address for the invited team member.

role.description: Role granted to the invited team member.

name.description: Display name for the first facility created during onboarding.

type.description: Facility type label created during onboarding.

pricePerHour.description: Initial hourly price configured for the onboarding facility.

businessName.description: Tenant-facing business name captured during onboarding.

businessType.description: Business archetype used to seed onboarding defaults.

facility.description: Facility that will be created during onboarding completion.

code.description: Unique promo code string entered by staff or customers.

discountType.description: Discount calculation mode used by the promo code.

discountValue.description: Discount value interpreted by the selected discount type.

maxUses.description: Optional maximum number of times the promo code can be used.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiry timestamp for the promo code.

facilityScope.description: Whether the promo code applies to all facilities or one facility.

facilityId.description: Facility identifier when the promo code is scoped to a single facility.

isActive.description: Initial activation flag for the promo code.

discountValue.description: Updated discount value interpreted by the selected type.

maxUses.description: Updated usage cap for the promo code.

expiresAt.description: Updated expiry timestamp for the promo code.

facilityScope.description: Updated facility scope for the promo code.

facilityId.description: Updated facility identifier when the code is facility-scoped.

isActive.description: Updated active state for the promo code.

enabled.description: Whether this channel is enabled for the notification.

whatsapp.description: WhatsApp delivery settings for the notification.

email.description: Email delivery settings for the notification.

enabled.description: Whether the scheduled notification is enabled.

sendTime.description: Local send time in 24-hour HH:mm format.

channels.description: Delivery channel preferences for the scheduled notification.

enabled.description: Whether the scheduled notification is enabled.

sendTime.description: Local send time in 24-hour HH:mm format.

channels.description: Delivery channel preferences for the scheduled notification.

dayOfWeek.description: Weekday used for the weekly summary, where 0 = Sunday.

enabled.description: Whether the realtime notification is enabled.

channels.description: Delivery channel preferences for the realtime notification.

leadMinutes.description: Lead time in minutes before a hold expiration alert is sent.

channels.description: Delivery channel preferences for the hold-expiring alert.

bookingCreated.description: Realtime notification settings for booking-created events.

bookingCancelled.description: Realtime notification settings for booking-cancelled events.

holdExpiring.description: Alert settings for expiring booking holds.

monthlyRevenueTarget.description: Monthly revenue target for the tenant.

markNudgeShown.description: Mark the goals nudge as shown to the user.

dismissNudge.description: Dismiss the goals nudge for the current tenant.
